{ access_token } = auth_state.value;

// Get all edits across all rows:
const changes = shopFloorEntryTable.changesetArray;

if (!changes || changes.length === 0) {
  utils.showNotification("No edits to save.", "warning");
  return;
}

console.log("Changeset:", changes);

// Loop through each changed row
async function applyUpdates() {
  for (const change of changes) {
    const spoolId = change.spool_id;

    // Get which columns were edited (excluding spool_id)
    const editableKeys = Object.keys(change).filter(k => k !== "spool_id");

    if (editableKeys.length === 0) continue;

    // Apply each column update individually
    for (const column of editableKeys) {
      const value = change[column];

      console.log(`Updating spool ${spoolId}: ${column} =`, value);

      const res = await fetch(
        "https://pzmjeppeaiztqzmgkgmp.supabase.co/rest/v1/rpc/update_spool_pm_smart",
        {
          method: "POST",
          headers: {
            "apikey": retoolContext.configVars.supabaseApiKey_fab_prod,
            "Authorization": `Bearer ${access_token}`,
            "Content-Type": "application/json",
          },
          body: JSON.stringify({
            _spool_id: spoolId,
            _column: column,
            _value: value
          })
        }
      );

      const txt = await res.text();
      console.log("RPC result:", txt);
    }
  }

  // Refresh the table
  await nextUpFilteredTableQuery.trigger();
  utils.showNotification("Updates saved!", "success");

  // Clear the changeset so Retool stops showing pending edits
  shopFloorEntryTable.clearChangeset();
}

return applyUpdates();

POLK FAB SHOP ENTRY

<div style="font-size:18px; color:#FFFFFF; margin-top:4px;">
{{
  (() => {
    // 🔹 PICK THE RIGHT DATA BASED ON TAB
    const d =
      tabs1.value === "Assemblies"
        ? (assemblyTable.data || [])
        : (finalTableTransformer.value || []);   // your existing spools source

    if (!d || d.length === 0) {
      return tabs1.value === "Assemblies"
        ? "No assemblies loaded"
        : "No spools loaded";
    }

    // Unique project names + package names
    const projects = [...new Set(d.map(r => r.project_name))];
    const packages = [...new Set(d.map(r => r.package_name))];
    const count = d.length;

    // Case 1 — one project + one package
    if (projects.length === 1 && packages.length === 1) {
      return `Project: ${projects[0]} → Package: ${packages[0]} → ${count} active ${
        tabs1.value === "Assemblies" ? "assemblies" : "spools"
      }`;
    }

    // Case 2 — one project, multiple packages
    if (projects.length === 1 && packages.length > 1) {
      return `Project: ${projects[0]} → ${packages.length} packages → ${count} active ${
        tabs1.value === "Assemblies" ? "assemblies" : "spools"
      }`;
    }

    // Case 3 — multiple projects AND multiple packages
    if (projects.length > 1) {
      return `${projects.length} projects → ${packages.length} packages → ${count} active ${
        tabs1.value === "Assemblies" ? "assemblies" : "spools"
      }`;
    }

    // Fallback
    return `${packages.length} packages → ${count} active ${
      tabs1.value === "Assemblies" ? "assemblies" : "spools"
    }`;
  })()
}}
</div>

  edits.push({ column: "fab_cost_code", value: fabCostCodeInput.value });

}

  edits.push({ column: "fabrication_labor_rate", value: fabricationLaborRateInput.value });
}

async function runUpdates() {
  for (const edit of edits) {
    await fetch(
      "https://pzmjeppeaiztqzmgkgmp.supabase.co/rest/v1/rpc/update_spool_pm_smart",

        headers: {

        },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          _spool_id: row.spool_id,
          _column: edit.column,
          _value: edit.value
        })
      }
    );
  }

  await nextUpFilteredTableQuery.trigger();
}

return const fabData = {{ fabPartnerList.data || [] }};
const selectedProject = {{ projectNameTableFilter3.value }};

function buildOptions(values) {
  const clean = Array.from(
    new Set(
      values
        .filter(v => v && v !== "None Selected")
        .map(v => v.trim())
    )
  ).sort();
  const options = clean.map(v => ({ label: v, value: v }));
  options.unshift({ label: "All Active", value: "" });
  return options;
}

// FAB PARTNER (always full list from unfiltered fabData)
const fabPartners = fabData.map(r => r.assigned_shop);

// PROJECT DROPDOWN (driven by fab-filtered spool data)
const projectOptions = Array.from(
  new Map(
    data
      .filter(r => r.project_id && r.projects?.project_name)
      .map(r => [r.project_id, { label: r.projects.project_name, value: r.project_id }])
  ).values()
);
projectOptions.unshift({ label: "All Active", value: "" });

// PACKAGE DROPDOWN (driven by fab + project filters)
const filteredByProject = (selectedProject && selectedProject !== "")
  ? data.filter(r => r.project_id === selectedProject)
  : data;
const packageOptions = Array.from(
  new Map(
    filteredByProject
      .filter(r => r.package_id && r.package_name)
      .map(r => [r.package_id, { label: r.package_name, value: r.package_id }])
  ).values()
);
packageOptions.unshift({ label: "All Active", value: "" });

// MATERIAL TYPES (unchanged)
const materialTypes = data.map(r => r.material_type);

// STATUSES — "All Active" default, then "Show All", then individual statuses
// "Show All" uses value: "All" — your query filter must check for this and skip status filtering
const statuses = data.map(r => r.current_status);

// DUE DATES — extract unique due dates, sort chronologically, format for display
const dueDateOptions = Array.from(
  new Set(
    data
      .map(r => r.date_needed)                        // pull the due_date field (adjust field name if needed)
      .filter(d => d && d !== "None Selected")      // drop nulls / blanks
  )
)
  .sort((a, b) => new Date(a) - new Date(b))        // sort ascending by actual date value
  .map(d => ({
    label: new Date(d).toLocaleDateString("en-US", { // human-readable label, e.g. "06/15/2025"
      month: "2-digit",
      day: "2-digit",
      year: "numeric",
      timeZone: "UTC"                                // prevents off-by-one from timezone shifts
    }),
    value: d                                         // raw value passed to your query filter
  }));

dueDateOptions.unshift({ label: "All Active", value: "" });

return {
  fabPartners:   buildOptions(fabPartners),
  materialTypes: buildOptions(materialTypes),
  statuses: [
    { label: "All Active", value: "" },
    { label: "Show All",   value: "All" },
    ...buildOptions(statuses).slice(1) // slice(1) removes duplicate "All Active" from buildOptions
  ],
  projectNames:  projectOptions,
  packageNames:  packageOptions,
  dueDates:      dueDateOptions        // ← new
};

// Inputs
// --------------------
const searchText = ({{ tableSearch.value }} || "")
  .toLowerCase()
  .trim();
const selectedStatus = {{ statusFilter.value }};
// --------------------
// Rules
// --------------------
const excludedStatuses = [
  "00 - Committed",
  "07 - Shipped",
  "10 - Canceled"
];
// --------------------
// STEP 1: STATUS FILTERING
// --------------------
let filtered;

if (selectedStatus === "All") {
  // Show All: no status filtering whatsoever
  filtered = data;
} else if (!selectedStatus || selectedStatus === "") {
  // All Active: exclude terminal/inactive statuses
  filtered = data.filter(r => !excludedStatuses.includes(r.current_status));
} else {
  // Any specific status (active or excluded) — exact match
  filtered = data.filter(r => r.current_status === selectedStatus);
}
// --------------------
// STEP 2: FLEXIBLE SEARCH
// --------------------
const normalize = (s) =>
  String(s || "")
    .toLowerCase()
    .replace(/[_-]/g, " ")
    .replace(/[^\w\s]/g, "")
    .replace(/\s+/g, " ")
    .trim();
const tokens = normalize(searchText).split(" ").filter(Boolean);
if (tokens.length) {
  filtered = filtered.filter((r) => {
    const haystack = normalize([
      r.spool_name,
      r.package_name,
      r.project_name,
      r.area,
      r.system,
      r.drawing_number
    ].filter(Boolean).join(" "));
    return tokens.every(t => haystack.includes(t));
  });
}
// --------------------
// STEP 3: OUTPUT NORMALIZATION
// --------------------
return filtered.map(r => ({
  ...r,
  project_name: r.project_name ?? null
}));

auth_state.setValue({ ...saved, isRefreshing: false });

// Decide whether we NEED a refresh
const now = Date.now();
const expiresAt = Number(saved.expires_at || 0);

// Refresh if token expires within next 2 minutes OR expires_at missing
const needsRefresh = !expiresAt || (expiresAt - now) < (2 * 60 * 1000);

if (!needsRefresh) {
  console.log("[restoreSession] ✅ Token still valid, session ready:", saved.user?.email);
  sessionReady.setValue(true);
  return;
}

console.log("[restoreSession] 🔄 Token near expiry (or unknown). Refreshing...");

try {
  const refreshed = await storeRefresh.trigger();

  if (refreshed?.access_token) {
    console.log("[restoreSession] ✅ Refreshed and restored:", refreshed.user?.email);
    sessionReady.setValue(true);
  } else {
    console.log("[restoreSession] ❌ Refresh failed, clearing session");
    auth_state.setValue({ isAuthenticated: false, isRefreshing: false });
    localStorage.setValue("supabaseAuth", null);
    sessionReady.setValue(false);
  }

} catch (err) {
  console.error("[restoreSession] ❌ Refresh error:", err);
  auth_state.setValue({ isAuthenticated: false, isRefreshing: false });
  localStorage.setValue("supabaseAuth", null);
  sessionReady.setValue(false);
  utils.showNotification.error("Session expired. Please log in again.");
}

    isRefreshing: false,

  auth_state.setValue({ isAuthenticated: false, isRefreshing: false });
  localStorage.setValue("supabaseAuth", null);
  localStorage.setValue(LOCK_KEY, null);
  sessionReady.setValue(false);
  return null;
}

function runBatchUpdate() {
  const { access_token } = auth_state.value;
  const selectedSpools = shopFloorEntryTable.selectedRows.map(r => r.spool_id);

  if (selectedSpools.length === 0) {
    utils.showNotification("No rows selected!", "warning");
    return;
  }

  const updates = {};

  if (batchSelectOptions.value.includes("actual_start_date")) {
    updates.actual_start_date = startDateBatchInput.value;
  }

  if (batchSelectOptions.value.includes("qc_completion_date")) {
    updates.qc_completion_date = qcCompletionDateBatchInput.value;
  }

  if (batchSelectOptions.value.includes("completion_date")) {
    updates.completion_date = shipDateBatchInput.value;
  }

  if (batchSelectOptions.value.includes("current_status")) {
    updates.current_status = currentStatusBatchInput.value;
  }

  if (batchSelectOptions.value.includes("fit_up_station")) {
    updates.fit_up_station = fitUpStationBatchInput.value;
  }

  if (batchSelectOptions.value.includes("weld_station")) {
    updates.weld_station = fweldUpStationBatchInput.value;
  }

  console.log("Sending batch updates:", updates);

  const response = await fetch(
    "https://pzmjeppeaiztqzmgkgmp.supabase.co/rest/v1/rpc/update_spool_pm_batch",
    {
      method: "POST",
      headers: {
        "apikey": retoolContext.configVars.supabaseApiKey_fab_prod,
        "Authorization": `Bearer ${access_token}`,
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
      },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        _spool_ids: selectedSpools,
        _updates: updates,
      }),
    }
  );

  const text = await response.text();
  console.log("Raw RPC response:", text);
  //console.log("Batch RPC result:", data);

  await nextUpFilteredTableQuery.trigger();
  utils.showNotification("Batch update complete!", "success");
}

return runBatchUpdate();

{ access_token } = auth_state.value;

const BASE_URL =
  "https://pzmjeppeaiztqzmgkgmp.supabase.co/rest/v1/spool_pm_data";

const PAGE_SIZE = 1000;
let page = 0;
let allRows = [];

while (true) {
  const params = [
    "select=onsite_delivery_date",
    "order=onsite_delivery_date.asc",
    `limit=${PAGE_SIZE}`,
    `offset=${page * PAGE_SIZE}`
  ];

  const queryUrl = `${BASE_URL}?${params.join("&")}`;

  const res = await fetch(queryUrl, {
    method: "GET",
    headers: {
      apikey: retoolContext.configVars.supabaseApiKey_fab_prod,
      Authorization: `Bearer ${access_token}`,
      "Content-Type": "application/json",
    },
  });

  const rows = await res.json();

  if (!Array.isArray(rows) || rows.length === 0) break;

  allRows = allRows.concat(rows);

  // Stop when fewer than PAGE_SIZE returned
  if (rows.length < PAGE_SIZE) break;

  page++;
}

console.log("onsite_delivery_date rows:", allRows.length);

return allRows;

base64ToBlob(base64Data, contentType = "") {
  if (!base64Data) {
    throw new Error("No base64 data provided");
  }

  // If data URL, split off metadata
  let base64 = base64Data.includes(",")
    ? base64Data.split(",")[1]
    : base64Data;

  // Remove whitespace/newlines
  base64 = base64.replace(/\s/g, "");

  // Convert URL-safe base64 → standard base64
  base64 = base64.replace(/-/g, "+").replace(/_/g, "/");

  // Pad with '=' if needed
  while (base64.length % 4 !== 0) {
    base64 += "=";
  }

  let byteString;
  try {
    byteString = atob(base64);
  } catch (e) {
    console.error("Invalid base64 string:", base64.slice(0, 100));
    throw new Error("Base64 decoding failed");
  }

  const arrayBuffer = new ArrayBuffer(byteString.length);
  const uint8Array = new Uint8Array(arrayBuffer);

  for (let i = 0; i < byteString.length; i++) {
    uint8Array[i] = byteString.charCodeAt(i);
  }

  return new Blob([arrayBuffer], {
    type: contentType || "application/octet-stream"
  });
}


// ----------------------------------------
// Upload Logic
// ----------------------------------------
const { access_token } = auth_state.value;
if (!access_token) {
  throw new Error("No Supabase access token available");
}

const files = photosInput.value || [];
if (!files.length) {
  return [];
}

const bucket = "spool_issues";
const uploadedUrls = [];

for (const file of files) {
  if (!file?.base64Data) {
    throw new Error(`Missing base64 data for file: ${file?.name}`);
  }

  const uniquePath = `issues/${Date.now()}_${file.name}`;
  const uploadUrl =
    `https://pzmjeppeaiztqzmgkgmp.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/${bucket}/${uniquePath}`;

  // 🔑 Robust base64 → Blob conversion
  const blob = base64ToBlob(file.base64Data, file.type);

  const res = await fetch(uploadUrl, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers: {
      apikey: retoolContext.configVars.supabaseApiKey_fab_prod,
      Authorization: `Bearer ${access_token}`,
      "Content-Type": file.type || "application/octet-stream",
      "x-upsert": "true"
    },
    body: blob
  });

  if (!res.ok) {
    const err = await res.text();
    throw new Error(`Upload failed (${file.name}): ${err}`);
  }

  uploadedUrls.push(
    `https://pzmjeppeaiztqzmgkgmp.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/${bucket}/${uniquePath}`
  );
}

return uploadedUrls;

const urls = await uploadImages.trigger();

// 2. Get note text and user ID
const notes = notesInput.value;
const userId = auth_state.value.user.id;

// 3. Get ALL selected spools
const spoolIds = shopFloorEntryTable.selectedRows.map(r => r.spool_id);

// SAFETY CHECK: if no rows selected, stop
if (spoolIds.length === 0) {
  throw new Error("No spools selected.");
}

// 4. Build an ARRAY of row objects (this is critical)
const batchRows = spoolIds.map(id => ({
  spool_id: id,
  notes: notes,
  image_urls: urls,
  created_by: userId
}));

console.log("Batch rows:", batchRows);

// 5. Send array to Supabase
const res = await fetch(
  "https://pzmjeppeaiztqzmgkgmp.supabase.co/rest/v1/spool_issues",
  {
    method: "POST",
    headers: {
      "apikey": retoolContext.configVars.supabaseApiKey_fab_prod,
      "Authorization": `Bearer ${auth_state.value.access_token}`,
      "Content-Type": "application/json",
      "Prefer": "return=representation"
    },
    body: JSON.stringify(batchRows) // IMPORTANT: must be an ARRAY
  }
);

const data = await res.json();
console.log("Insert response:", data);

if (!res.ok) {
  throw new Error(JSON.stringify(data));
}

utils.showNotification({
  title: "Issues Submitted",
  description: `${batchRows.length} issues created.`,
  type: "success"
});

return data;

const session = data?.session;
const user = data?.user;

if (!session || !user) {
  console.error("❌ Login failed:", data?.error || data);
  utils.showNotification({title: "❌ Login failed", description: "Please check Email or Password", notificationType: "error", duration: 5} );
  auth_state.setValue({ isAuthenticated: false });
  sessionReady.setValue(false);
  return;
}

// ✅ Clear any old/bad session first (prevents stale token issues)
localStorage.setValue("supabaseAuth", null); // ✅ Retool-safe


// Compute expires_at (epoch ms) from expires_in seconds
const expiresAt = Date.now() + (session.expires_in * 1000);

const sessionData = {
  isAuthenticated: true,
  access_token: session.access_token,
  refresh_token: session.refresh_token,
  token_type: session.token_type || "bearer",
  expires_at: expiresAt,
  user,
  isRefreshing: false,
};


// ✅ Mark session ready immediately after login
auth_state.setValue(sessionData);
localStorage.setValue("supabaseAuth", sessionData);
sessionReady.setValue(true);
console.log("✅ Logged in:", user.email);

// ✅ Navigate only on confirmed success
utils.openPage("Shop_Floor_Spool_Tracker");

// Get all edits across all rows:
const changes = shopFloorEntryTable.changesetArray;

if (!changes || changes.length === 0) {
  utils.showNotification("No edits to save.", "warning");
  return;
}

console.log("Changeset:", changes);

// Loop through each changed row
async function applyUpdates() {
  for (const change of changes) {
    const spoolId = change.spool_id;

    // Get which columns were edited (excluding spool_id)
    const editableKeys = Object.keys(change).filter(k => k !== "spool_id");

    if (editableKeys.length === 0) continue;

    // Apply each column update individually
    for (const column of editableKeys) {
      const value = change[column];

      console.log(`Updating spool ${spoolId}: ${column} =`, value);

      const res = await fetch(
        "https://pzmjeppeaiztqzmgkgmp.supabase.co/rest/v1/rpc/update_spool_pm_smart",
        {
          method: "POST",
          headers: {
            "apikey": retoolContext.configVars.supabaseApiKey_fab_prod,
            "Authorization": `Bearer ${access_token}`,
            "Content-Type": "application/json",
          },
          body: JSON.stringify({
            _spool_id: spoolId,
            _column: column,
            _value: value
          })
        }
      );

      const txt = await res.text();
      console.log("RPC result:", txt);
    }
  }

  // Refresh the table
  await nextUpFilteredTableQuery.trigger();
  utils.showNotification("Updates saved!", "success");

  // Clear the changeset so Retool stops showing pending edits
  shopFloorEntryTable.clearChangeset();
}

return { access_token } = auth_state.value;

// Get all edits across all rows:
const changes = assemblyTable.changesetArray;

if (!changes || changes.length === 0) {
  utils.showNotification("No edits to save.", "warning");
  return;
}

console.log("Assembly Changeset:", changes);

// Loop through each changed row
async function applyUpdates() {
  for (const change of changes) {
    const assemblyId = change.assembly_id;

    // Get which columns were edited (excluding assembly_id)
    const editableKeys = Object.keys(change)
      .filter(k => k !== "assembly_id");

    if (editableKeys.length === 0) continue;

    // Apply each column update individually
    for (const column of editableKeys) {
      const value = change[column];

      console.log(
        `Updating assembly ${assemblyId}: ${column} =`,
        value
      );

      const res = await fetch(
        "https://pzmjeppeaiztqzmgkgmp.supabase.co/rest/v1/rpc/update_assembly_smart",
        {
          method: "POST",
          headers: {
            "apikey": retoolContext.configVars.supabaseApiKey_fab_prod,
            "Authorization": `Bearer ${access_token}`,
            "Content-Type": "application/json",
          },
          body: JSON.stringify({
            _assembly_id: assemblyId,
            _column: column,
            _value: value
          })
        }
      );

      const txt = await res.text();
      console.log("RPC result:", txt);
    }
  }

  // Refresh your assemblies table query
  await assembliesQuery.trigger();

  utils.showNotification("Assembly updates saved!", "success");

  // Clear the changeset so Retool stops showing pending edits
  assemblyTable.clearChangeset();
}

return applyUpdates();

// Rules
// --------------------

// --------------------
// STEP 1: STATUS FILTERING
// --------------------

  );

  // Otherwise hide excluded statuses
  filtered = data.filter(
    r => !excludedStatuses.includes(r.current_status)
  );
}

// --------------------
// STEP 2: FLEXIBLE SEARCH FILTERING (tokenized)
// --------------------
const normalize = (s) =>
  String(s || "")
    .toLowerCase()
    .replace(/[_-]/g, " ")        // treat - and _ as spaces
    .replace(/[^\w\s]/g, "")     // remove punctuation (keep letters/numbers/space)
    .replace(/\s+/g, " ")        // collapse whitespace
    .trim();

const tokens = normalize(searchText).split(" ").filter(Boolean);

if (tokens.length) {
  filtered = filtered.filter((r) => {
    // Build a "haystack" of fields you want searchable
    // Add/remove fields as needed
    const haystack = normalize([

      r.package_name,
      r.project_name,
      r.area,              // if you have it
      r.system,            // if you have it
      r.drawing_number     // if you have it
    ].filter(Boolean).join(" "));

    // Require ALL tokens to be present somewhere (flexible "area j" behavior)
    return tokens.every(t => haystack.includes(t));
  });
}


// --------------------
// STEP 3: NORMALIZE OUTPUT
// --------------------

async function applyUpdates() {
  for (const change of changes) {
    const assemblyId = change.assembly_id;

    const editableKeys = Object.keys(change)

    for (const column of editableKeys) {

          body: JSON.stringify({
            _assembly_id: assemblyId,

  await assembliesQuery.trigger();

  assemblyTable.clearChangeset();
}

  "https://pzmjeppeaiztqzmgkgmp.supabase.co/functions/v1/get_package_docs",
  {
    method: "POST",
    headers: {
      "Authorization": `Bearer ${access_token}`,
      "apikey": retoolContext.configVars.supabaseApiKey_fab_prod,
      "Content-Type": "application/json"
    },
    body: JSON.stringify({
      package_id: packageId,
      doc_type: "bom"
    })
  }
);

const data = await res.json();
if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error);

if (data.urls?.xlsx) {
  utils.openUrl(data.urls.xlsx);
} else {
  utils.showNotification({ title: "No XLSX BOM found for this package", intent: "warning" });

const packageId = packageSelector.value;

if (!packageId) return [];

async function loadSpools() {
  const BASE_URL = "https://pzmjeppeaiztqzmgkgmp.supabase.co/rest/v1/spools";
  const PAGE_SIZE = 1000;
  let page = 0;
  let allRows = [];

  while (true) {
    const params = [
      "select=spool_id,spool_name,packages(package_name)",
      `package_id=eq.${packageId}`,
      "order=spool_name.asc",
      `limit=${PAGE_SIZE}`,
      `offset=${page * PAGE_SIZE}`
    ];
    const queryUrl = `${BASE_URL}?${params.join("&")}`;

    const response = await fetch(queryUrl, {
      method: "GET",
      headers: {
        apikey: retoolContext.configVars.supabaseApiKey_fab_prod,
        Authorization: `Bearer ${access_token}`,
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
      },
    });

    const rows = await response.json();
    if (!Array.isArray(rows) || rows.length === 0) break;
    // Flatten the nested package name
    const flattened = rows.map(r => ({
      spool_id: r.spool_id,
      spool_name: r.spool_name,
      package_name: r.packages?.package_name || "",
    }));
    allRows = allRows.concat(flattened);
    if (rows.length < PAGE_SIZE) break;
    page++;
  }

  console.log("Spools loaded:", allRows.length);
  return allRows;
}
